subcodes.first_line: O Abu'l-Qásim! The Most Exalted Pen, in the prison of 'Akká, beareth witness to the sanctification of the Divine Essence from peer or likeness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اباالقاسم قلم اعلی در سجن عکا شهادت میدهد بتقدیس ذات احدیه از شریک و مثال
subcodes.subjects: @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
